text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho gets injured during training so I rush
her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Please. You're making way too big a deal about
this, Familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I really did hurt myself. I guess that means
we're done training, right?
choice_data_list:
That's right. Take the rest of the day off just to
be safe...

That's right. Take the rest of the day off just to
be safe...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay then, I'm going to the mountains!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?! I'm gonna pick medicinal herbs.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I've already decided to gather ingredients for
magic potions today.
choice_data_list: You need to stay home and rest.
Well, it shouldn't hurt to move around a bit...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Why?! I'm fine! It's just gathering herbs! I've made
up my mind, so don't try to stop me!
choice_data_list:
What if your injury gets worse while you're
hiking?

What if your injury gets worse while you're
hiking?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Like I'd let that happen! Anyway, I'm in a hurry,
so—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph...
If you're gonna be like that, then you better go
pick them for me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Come to think of it, I should have my familiars
gather things for me in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, get to it! I'm a busy genius magical girl,
y'know. I can't change my plans!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As instructed, I hike up the mountain and search
for herbs in place of Sweep Tosho, while she stays
in the dorm and sulks.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Exactly! Just going to pick herbs is nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, just kidding! It doesn't hurt at all! Anyway, I
need to get going before the sun starts going d—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She doesn't seem okay at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop her right there and make her rest, though
she seems unhappy the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but worry still, so I decide to
accompany her to the mountains.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
See, what did I tell you? I'm totally fine! An injury
like this is nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to get those herbs! You be sure to
pick some too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Japanese honeysuckle! I found some! Over
here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now I can make tons of magic potions! And
hiking is kinda like training too, so it's a
win-win! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, Sweep Tosho's injury doesn't get any
worse, and the light hiking doubles as training.
